purpose: Description-selection cases that separate firmware outcomes from generic Comet and pre-boot operation.

cases.query: Use the Comet to enter BIOS and enable IOMMU on pve01.
Map the UEFI menus on this MSI Z690 board.
Verify that CPU Lite Load is still Mode 9 before saving.
Change PL1 in BIOS and validate the run with HWiNFO.
Show me the POST error through the Comet.
Open the one-time boot menu and select the rescue ISO.
Reboot the frozen Proxmox node through the KVM.
Read the recovery shell and type this repair command.
Analyze this HWiNFO CSV without changing firmware.
